entity.summary: Hedera ecosystem decentralized exchange application developed within the HSuite platform, whose V1 product suite included DEX, NFT exchange, multisig, and related SmartNode-powered applications.
entity.notes: First-party HSuite documentation states that its V1 application suite included a DEX and that the Hedera Mainnet V1 technology remains production-ready after more than two years live. Current registry data reports substantial Hedera TVL and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume. HSuite is now broadening into a multi-chain infrastructure platform, so this record isolates the exchange surface while preserving HbarSuite and HSuite aliases.

evidence.title: HSuite platform documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation states that HSuite V1 built and operated applications including a DEX, NFT Exchange, and MultiSig and describes the transition toward a broader infrastructure platform.

evidence.title: HSuite web application
evidence.notes: Current first-party HSuite application endpoint remains reachable. The official documentation reports Hedera Mainnet V1 technology as production-ready and live for more than two years.

evidence.title: HbarSuite DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies HbarSuite as a Hedera DEX, corroborating the exchange surface described in first-party HSuite documentation.

evidence.title: HbarSuite official website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party domain is linked from the current protocol registry and preserves the HbarSuite product identity.

evidence.title: HbarSuite protocol metrics and information
evidence.notes: Current profile classifies HbarSuite as an audited Hedera AMM DEX and reports current TVL and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day exchange volume.
